headline: India's Wipro unveils record buyback after slight quarterly revenue miss
summary: BENGALURU, April 16 (Reuters) - India's Wipro announced a record share buyback of up to 150 billion rupees ($1.61 billion) on Thursday after reporting a slight quarterly revenue miss, as clients held
